slides.title: Low magnesium shows up as bad *sleep*.
slides.sub: Most people run low on it and blame everything else. The signs are quieter than you'd think.

slides.title: It runs the relaxation
slides.body: Magnesium powers hundreds of reactions, including *muscle and nerve relaxation*, and many people quietly under-eat it.

slides.title: The off-switch mineral
slides.body: Getting enough magnesium *may support deeper sleep* and a calmer wind-down at night.

slides.title: Ease the tension
slides.body: It *may ease muscle cramps* and the everyday tension you carry, including a clenched jaw.

slides.title: Eat it before you pill it
slides.body: Leafy greens, nuts, seeds, beans, and dark chocolate are loaded with it. *Food before supplements*.

slides.title: What burns through it
slides.body: *Heavy alcohol and chronic stress* drain magnesium faster, so the more stressed you are, the more you need.

slides.title: Eat your way to *calmer nights*.
slides.body: Snap your meals and Vibe Health logs your food, so you can spot whether magnesium-rich foods are actually showing up.

caption:
Low magnesium often shows up as bad sleep, and most people blame everything else. 🌙

It runs muscle and nerve relaxation, may support deeper sleep, and may ease cramps and a clenched jaw. Get it from greens, nuts, seeds and beans first. Save this. 🔖

Snap your meals and Vibe Health logs your food for you → link in bio.
youtube_title: How Low Magnesium Wrecks Your Sleep
